judge_reason: Description A quotes specific barcode numbers ('62-HQ-83894-E403', 'RRP00A1W1WL') that contradict Description B's reading of the same visual elements ('62-HQ-83894-E403', 'RRP00AIWL'), indicating at least one side is fabricating verbatim text from the images.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A manila FBI records envelope with two white label stickers, handwritten and stamped text including “DO NOT DESTROY,” “62-83894-403,” and a blue declassification notice sticker in the lower right.*
